name: Cottage Cheese Pancake
recipeInstructions:
1. Whisk all ingredients together in a blender until smooth.
2. Pour batter onto a hot griddle or frying pan.
3. Cook the pancakes until bubbles form on the surface and the edges start to look dry.
4. Flip the pancakes using a spatula, cooking for another minute or so on the other side.
5. Serve as desired. Typically, I make smaller pancakes when preparing them for children, as they prefer many tiny ones instead of just a couple of larger ones.
